prompt: A desktop wallpaper featuring a horizontal four-panel split layout with thick black borders. It showcases half-body portraits in a high-contrast {argument name="art style" default="woodcut printmaking"} style with thick black lines and cross-hatching, conveying a confident and elite mood. From left to right: {argument name="subject 1" default="Jack Ma"} against a textured orange background; {argument name="subject 2" default="Elon Musk"} in a suit against a textured red background; {argument name="subject 3" default="Mark Zuckerberg"} in a black shirt against a textured blue background; and {argument name="subject 4" default="Pony Ma"} wearing glasses and a suit against a textured green background. The subjects are rendered in monochromatic beige tones, contrasting sharply with the vibrant background of each pane.
translatedPrompt: 一张带有横向四联分屏布局和粗黑边框的桌面壁纸。它展示了半身肖像，采用高对比度的 {argument name="art style" default="木刻版画"} 风格，运用粗线条和交叉排线，传达出自信且精英的氛围。从左至右依次为：背景为纹理橙色的 {argument name="subject 1" default="马云"}；背景为纹理红色的身着西装的 {argument name="subject 2" default="埃隆·马斯克"}；背景为纹理蓝色的身着黑色衬衫的 {argument name="subject 3" default="马克·扎克伯格"}；以及背景为纹理绿色、戴眼镜穿西装的 {argument name="subject 4" default="马化腾"}。人物主体以单色米色调呈现，与每个分屏鲜艳的背景形成强烈对比。

breakdown.creativeCore: 四联木刻版画风格肖像壁纸：生成一张四联分屏壁纸，以高对比度的版画风格呈现独特的肖像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: horizontal]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
